sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83624" key="pla/twnis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλάτωνις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n83624.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deer with broad antlers,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
